conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I'm working on two projects simultaneously: Project Atlas, a B2B SaaS tool, and Project Nova, an internal analytics dashboard.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: For Project Atlas I need to pick a database. I'm considering Postgres and MongoDB.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: For Project Nova the data is highly relational so I'll definitely use Postgres there.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Project Atlas stores a lot of unstructured user-generated content, so MongoDB makes more sense for that one.

query: What database did the user choose for Project Atlas?
